titleStmt.title: SII 31.253: original edition by C. A. Padmanabha Sastri and T. S. Ravishankar
No. 253. (A.R. No. B 263 of 1936.) PEDDACHINTAKUNTA, SIRUVEL TALUK, KURNOOL DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a pillar in the mukha-maṇḍapa of the Sāmbaśi-vēśvara temple.
It is dated in the cyclic year Śaka, Ashāḍha, śu. 15, Thursday.

It refers to the land sale deed. It records the sharing of one-fourth (nālavapōlu) of the produce of lands belonging to Anna-jiyya to Javemula Naga-Jiyya and further states that the sons of Annajiyya namely Sidda-jiyya, Mara-jiyya and Kampa-jiyya had agreed to continue remit as per stipulation of their father. The transaction was written with the permission of Pochama-reḍḍi, Kasavi-reḍḍi and several others. The record was engraved by Jogirāju and Aubalarāju and prepared by Bairajumalya.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
� su(śu)kla saṁvatsara Āṣā
ḍha su(śu) 15 gu� ciṁtakuṁṭa
rāmāyadēvara stānaṁ
lōsirivrōḍa(la) Aṁnnajiyya
la cēla nālavapālu
kāvēmula nāgajiyyalaku
krayamugānu I
stimigāna Idi Āṁna
jīyyakoḍukulu siddha

jiyya mārajiyya kaṁ
pajiyya sayitaṁ mā
taṁḍri mīku Icinakrayaṁ
pālu Aṭē celliṁcuvāru .
Ācaṁdratārkaṁ(tārakaṁ)gāsu Istimi .
sākṣi ciṁtakuṁṭa prabhulu
pōcemareḍinni kasavireḍinni ma
ṁce bōyinireḍinni mutti
nāyani pocenāyiṁḍu stā
napatulu mallajiyyaprō

la jiyyasayitamaina prajala
UnmatamaivrauI
ṁcina sā(śā)śa(sa)namu . vrāsinavāṁḍlu
jōgirāju Aubaḷarāju mala
cinavāṁḍu bhairōju malya . maṁ
gaḷa mahā śrī
Digital edition of SII 31.253 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
